user_query: I'm a content creator on TikTok and I'm looking for popular videos that feature a specific music track with the ID '6928004115846924290'. Can you help me find 20 videos that have used this music track?

TaskList.description: Use the TikTok API to search for videos that feature the specific music track ID.
Filter the results to get the top 20 most popular videos using the specified track.
Compile the filtered video data into a user-friendly format.
